name: io.github.przeslijmi/real-fake-data-mcp
title: Real Fake Data
description: Realistic synthetic test data — valid PESELs, NIPs, IBANs, addresses, people across 27 EU countries.

environmentVariables.name: REAL_FAKE_DATA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`, lifting requests onto your metered plan. Omit to use the anonymous lane.

environmentVariables.name: REAL_FAKE_DATA_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the hosted API. Defaults to https://api.real-fake-data.com; point it at a local API during development.
